scripts.build: yarn build:parser && yarn build:transformer && yarn build:idea && yarn build:example
scripts.report:js: rm -rf .nyc_output coverage && NODE_OPTIONS="--experimental-loader @istanbuljs/esm-loader-hook" ./node_modules/.bin/nyc node packages/idea-node/tests/smoke.mjs && NODE_OPTIONS="--experimental-loader @istanbuljs/esm-loader-hook" ./node_modules/.bin/nyc --no-clean node ./node_modules/mocha/bin/mocha -r tsx packages/idea-transformer/tests/Transformer.test.ts && ./node_modules/.bin/nyc report -r lcov
scripts.report:rust: mkdir -p packages/idea-rust/coverage && rustup run stable cargo llvm-cov --manifest-path packages/idea-rust/Cargo.toml --workspace --lcov --output-path packages/idea-rust/coverage/lcov.info
scripts.test: yarn test:rust && yarn test:parser && yarn test:transformer
